overview.summary: Model score 8 vs user score 9 (gap -1). Primary drivers: Location Stability, Session Duration. Agreement classification: USER_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Model relied more heavily on objective sensor stability, while user-reported distraction tolerance was lower than inferred.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio signal quality was adequate. Improve policy by up-weighting persistent >60 dBA exposure in cognitively demanding sessions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals alignment was acceptable, but confidence should be capped when biometric coverage is sparse.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Frequent posture changes should reduce focus confidence unless corroborated by improved audio and vitals.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS changes should trigger context shift checks, but not directly drive concentration score changes.

judgment_policy_next_run: Reduce compensatory credit from stationary motion when primary factors are adverse.
Add readiness-context interaction terms for activity and environment mismatch.
